site.name: Oak & Pixel
site.description: Oak & Pixel Studio is a boutique premium digital studio in Randburg building refined websites, booking experiences, client portals, integrations, and ongoing digital presence management.

pages.title: Oak & Pixel - Digital Infrastructure, Designed with Distinction

services.name: Signature Plan
services.summary: A professional digital foundation with a premium website up to 5 pages, booking integration, lead capture, domain and hosting management, website maintenance, 2 monthly content updates, and email support. Pricing is R25,000 setup plus R4,499/month.

services.name: Growth Plan
services.summary: The core OPS offering for growing businesses, with everything in Signature plus up to 10 pages, landing pages, onboarding journeys, document collection, CRM integration, payment integration, 5 monthly content updates, and priority support. Pricing is R40,000 setup plus R6,999/month.

services.name: Premium Plan
services.summary: A highly tailored digital ecosystem with everything in Growth plus bespoke digital experiences, interactive sections, advanced animations, client portal implementation, advanced integrations, monthly optimization reviews, and a dedicated account lead. Pricing is R65,000 setup plus R12,499/month.

services.name: Digital Experience Scope
services.summary: A focused scoping conversation for matching the right OPS plan to the client journey, website requirements, integrations, and support needs.
